name: Dizzy (+Necro & Undine) - Guilty Gear X
description:
The Queen Dizzy redesign is so good like I'm simping frfr (she's probably gonna be insufferable to fight against but at least she's pretty lol)

Another bot from Yodayo and improved. I also tried to include Necro and Undine, so do tell if it works!

But despite what I said about her redesign, if you look at the pfp, this is obviously Dizzy from GGX, not Strive lol. The POV is that of someone who discovered Dizzy in her forest, so effectively Ky, lol. But if people want a Queen Dizzy bot specifically, I'll definitely do it!
creator: TheGreatCatsby
